title: Merck Wins First-Ever Oral PCSK9 Approval for Lipfendra
headline: Merck's Lipfendra (enlicitide) becomes the first FDA-approved once-daily oral PCSK9 inhibitor, beating AstraZeneca to market for reducing LDL-C in hypercholesterolemia.
key_facts: Approval date: July 16, 2026; Drug: Lipfendra (enlicitide); Mechanism: novel macrocyclic peptide; First oral PCSK9 inhibitor (existing competitors are injectables); Indication: reduce LDL-C in adults with hypercholesterolemia and heterozygous familial hypercholesterolemia (HeFH)

title: Eli Lilly to Acquire AtaiBeckley for $2.8B
headline: Eli Lilly agrees to acquire psychedelic-focused AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion upfront, marking Big Pharma's strongest embrace of psychedelic medicine for treatment-resistant depression.
key_facts: Deal value: $2.8B upfront (possible additional milestones); Target: AtaiBeckley Inc. (Nasdaq: ATAI), clinical-stage psychedelic-inspired medicines; Buyer: Eli Lilly (NYSE: LLY); Lilly's 2026 M&A pace: 11 drugmakers acquired (most among pharma peers); BPL-003 Phase 2b: 11.1-point MADRS decrease at Day 29 vs. 5.8-point placebo [NOTES-ONLY — NEEDS PRIMARY VERIFICATION]

title: Kalshi Launches Prediction Markets for Biotech Catalysts
headline: Prediction-market platform Kalshi will allow bets on clinical trial outcomes and FDA approval decisions.
key_facts: New offering covering clinical trial results and FDA decisions; Platform: Kalshi

title: VivoSim Labs Plunges 25% on $4M Private Placement

title: Celcuity Gains FDA Approval for Revtorpyk, Shares Fall 20%
headline: Celcuity receives FDA approval for breast cancer drug Revtorpyk but shares fall nearly 20% on disclosed launch delay.
key_facts: Drug: Revtorpyk; Indication: breast cancer; FDA approval date: July 15, 2026; Share decline: ~20%

title: 2026 H1 Pharma M&A Hits $134B, Exceeds Full-Year 2025
headline: First-half 2026 biopharma M&A reaches $134B with 33 acquisitions ≥$1B; full-year 2026 projected to exceed $250B.
key_facts: 2026 H1 M&A: $134B in deals; Full-year 2025: $112B; 33 acquisitions ≥$1B in H1 2026; Projected 2026 total: >$250B; Vertex acquires Crinetics for $10B (7/6); Ligand completes XOMA Royalty acquisition at $39.00/share (7/14); Novartis buys Myricx Bio: $1.1B upfront; AstraZeneca takes rights to Dizal lung cancer pill: $600M upfront; AbbVie/Apogee: ~$10.9B equity value; Merck in talks to buy Revolution Medicines: $28B–$32B

title: Sanofi Sues Pfizer, Moderna Over mRNA Patents
headline: Sanofi files patent litigation against Pfizer and Moderna over mRNA technology intellectual property.
key_facts: Plaintiff: Sanofi; Defendants: Pfizer, Moderna; Dispute: mRNA patents; Date: July 15, 2026
